characters.name: Albert
characters.description: AlbertFriendsChris Rock(Former Friend)Age15EnemiesChris RockGreg WuligerJoey CarusoMs. MorelloFirst AppearanceEverybody Hates the New KidActorKwame BoatengLast AppearanceEverybody Hates the New Kid Albertwas the episode's titular new kid who appeared inEverybody Hates the New KidatCorleone Junior High School. He and Chris quickly became friends but is not nice to everyone else in school. He quickly becomes friends with Chris at school since they are the only black kids in school. They bond pretty quickly not only for being only black kids but because of their shared "black" interests. Greg initially does not seem as welcoming to Albert, initially out slight jealousy and insecurity, believing Chris will end up deserting him and preferring his friendship with Albert over him now. However, Greg notices later notices that Albert has a bad reputation and is a jerk to everyone else. Greg then confronts Chris about insulting another student as this is not how usually Chris is. Chris dismisses Greg's accusations of Albert, still thinking Greg is jealous.

characters.name: Angel
characters.description: Angel(actually pronounced "On-hell" but people address him by how it's spelled), an androgynous male student at Tattaglia High, who is in Chris's cooking class. He helps Chris meet a girl in exchange for Chris helping him with his homework. Because of Angel's androgyny, he and Chris prefer not to be seen together in public. Angel appears a few times in Season 4.

characters.name: Art Wuliger
characters.description: Art WuligerBiographyFull NameArthur WuligerGenderMaleAge42Born1941RelativesSpouseUnknown Wife (ex-wife)ParentsGreg's Grandmother(mother)ChildrenGreg Wuliger(son)Production InformationAppeared inEverybody Hates GregPortrayed byGary Basaraba Art Wuliger isGreg Wuliger's dad.

characters.name: Bernard Yao
characters.description: Bernard Yaois a comedic fictional character from the comedy sitcomEverybody Loves Chris. He is Asian and mostly fails his math tests. In “Everybody Loves the Bachelor Pad”, Bernard Yao is seen forcingGreginto his locker, initially bullying him. In “Everybody Loves Caruso”, Bernard Yao was seen by Chris and Greg fightingJoey Caruso. Bernard Yao is portrayed by comedian Shung Yai. Bernard Yao is Caruso’s chasing-up toasty friend. In season 3 episode 5, Bernard Yao is seen bullying Greg by putting him in a locker. Bernard Yao learned one thing: “never bully friends” and still failed math tests. Crazy as fuck, Greg tells Chris that Bernard Yao has been appearing at Corleone since season 2. Bernard Yao is secretly queer.

characters.name: Big Bird
characters.description: KellyNameJacqueline Borelli (Born Name)Kelly (Real Name)Age15.5EnemiesJoey CarusoGreg WuligerChris Rock(Ex-boyfriend)Stephanie Borelli (Sister)First AppearanceEverybody Hates Big BirdActorNina ManskerLast AppearanceEverybody Hates Big Bird Kelly, akaBig Bird,  is a character that only appears in "Everybody Hates Big Bird". Kelly is an awkward, tall girl who got bullied byJoey Carusoand other students, mainly players on the football team. . She briefly dated Chris who she was friends with, but broke up with him after he refused to stand up to some football players when they were making fun of her after catching her kissing Chris in the boys locker room. The next day, Kelly completely changed her look after her mother took her to the mall to get a makeover. She angrily tells Chris she has no intention of forgiving him and rejects going on a date with him again.  She says she's moving to Paris so Cindy Crawford can turn her into a supermodel.

characters.name: Blackie
characters.description: Blackiewas the family's guard dog inEverybody Hates Blackie, who was meant to prevent break-ins whileChrisand his family were gone. He was named by Julius, to whichDrewis confused that Blackie wasn't black. Blackie liked the family except forJulius, who he growled at. In the episode, Blackie also sits in Julius' chair and steals his bacon. Blackie understood Spanish better than he did English, though this isn't revealed until Carlos orders Blackie to sit and stand in Spanish. Carlos also adds that Blackie can't be a security dog because he not a fighter, which is why Chris had trouble training him. Blackie later ran away from the house, and he was found the next day barking and chasing Chris.

characters.name: Carol and Carole
characters.description: Carol and Carole, portrayed by Kara and Katelyn Pacitto, are minor antagonists inEverybody Hates Chris. Carol and Carole are popular white twin girls that attendCorleone Junior High School. Carol and Carole are pale-skinned. They often wear black wigs along with colorful fashion and accessories.

characters.name: Charlotte
characters.description: CharlotteBiographyAge40sRelativesParentsGene(Father)Maxine(Mother)SiblingsRochelle Rock(Sister)Uncle Mike(Brother)RelationshipsMousey(Maternal Aunt)Julius Rock(Brother-in-law)Chris Rock(Nephew)Drew Rock(Nephew)Tonya Rock(Niece)Production InformationEpisode appearancesEverybody Hates Funerals Charlottenicknamed Greivey is the sister ofRochelleandMike,GeneandMaxine's daughter,Julius's sister-in-law, and the maternal aunt ofChris,Drew, andTonya. She makes her only appearance inEverybody Hates Funeralsafter hearing the news of her father's passing and constantly crying. Her nickname, Greivey, comes from her only being known to make family appearances exclusively at funerals and no other occasions and constantly crying. Charlotte's presence is only inEverybody Hates Funeralsto come visit with her family atRochelle's house after her father's death. She along with the extended family comes to stay with Rochelle while planningGene's funeral. Throughout the episode, she was always having tissues, constantly crying and blowing her nose and on the phone. She appears throughout the planning of the funeral at the home to help pick out a casket, but when Rochelle andMaxinebegin to argue about the casket, Greivey begins to sob loudly again until Maxine stops and orders herself and the rest of the family to leave and let Rochelle make the decision.

characters.name: Chris Rock (character)
characters.description: Christopher Julius Rock IIISeason 1Season 2Seasons 3 & 4AnimatedBiographyImageSeason 1Season 2Seasons 3 & 4AnimatedAge13 (Season 1)13-14 (Season 2)14-15 (Season 3)15-16 (Season 4)16-17 (Everybody Still Hates Chris)BornApril 4, 1971HometownNew York, U.S.A.HouseBed-Stuy, Brooklyn, New York, U.S.A.Personal InformationProfessionStudent (dropped out; Original Series)Grocery Store ClerkEducation/SchoolCorleone Junior High School (Seasons 1-3)Tattaglia High School (Season 4)Grade7th Grade (Season 1)8th Grade (Season 2)9th Grade (Season 3)10th Grade (Season 4)Physical InformationHair ColourBlackEye ColourBrownHeight5’0 (season 1) 5’3(season 2) 5’9(seasons 3 & 4)Weight52 kgSkin ColourMedium Brown (Original Series)Dark Brown (Still Hates)RaceAfrican-AmericanRelativesParentsJulius(father)Rochelle(mother)SiblingsDrew(younger brother)Tonya(younger sister)FriendsGreg Wuliger(best friend)JeromeJamesJoey CarusoDoc(manager/second best friend)Manny Dickerson(football team assistant)Peaches Clarkson(friend)Vanessa(friend)Keisha(former neighbor)Pam(friend)RiskyEnemiesJoey Caruso(formerly)Coach ThurmanAlbertRelationshipsKeisha(crush on his side)Yvette (crush)Jenise Huxtable (Former)Kelly(ex-girlfriend)Tasha Clarkson(ex-girlfriend)Production InformationAppeared in"Everybody Hates the Pilot"Episode appearances88 out of 88Portrayed byTyler James WilliamsTim Johnson Jr. Coach ThurmanAlbert Yvette (crush)Jenise Huxtable (Former)Kelly(ex-girlfriend)Tasha Clarkson(ex-girlfriend) Chris is a slightly dorky and insecure young boy, between being woefully untalented in most things he does, living in his younger brother's shadow, and for two years, being the only black kid in a predominately white school. He is a very polite and approachable person but his awkwardness does not make it easy for him to make friends most of the time. For a long time, his only friend at school was Greg, but as he gets used to socializing and growing up, he makes a pretty decent, close circle of reliable, caring friends. Chris is very catering to his family, who don't always appreciate it, Tonya in particular. Typically, he'll suffer in silence, but his patience has limits, such as when he told Tonya he hated her when she kept acting out at the laundromat, or refused to clean up after the family when Rochelle ordered him to while Drew and Tonya got to watch TV. Chris has a bit of a selfish side, where he'll feel the need to prove himself or become "cooler" by any means necessary, even if it negatively impacts people he cares about, like when he peer-pressures Greg into loaning him five dollars to play Jorge for money and protect his reputation as the topAsteroidsplayer in Brooklyn. Otherwise, his selfishness is based more on pragmaticism and the hard choices, such as when he hesitantly dropped Greg as his running partner in the school elections in favor of Frank DiPaolo, who is extremely popular and could get more people to listen to him.

characters.name: Coach Thurman
characters.description: Coach ThurmanBiographyImageThurman.pngGenderMaleAge48-49Born1938Personal InformationProfessionTeacher, football coachPhysical InformationHair ColourBrownRelativesFriendsDickerson Chris(football hall co worker)EnemiesChris(curently)Production InformationAppeared inEverybody Hates TattagliaPortrayed byPaul Ben-Victor Roy Thurman, Chris' homeroom and social studies teacher in Tattaglia and also the coach for the football team. He hires Chris as the team's manager. He is hateful, sarcastic and unfair against people, especially towards Chris, and it is implied that he is racist or at least prejudiced, despite denying that he is, as he believes that the reason why black people were brought into slavery was because white people were too lazy to work. He once helped Chris by teaching how to box, despite the constant belittling he always gives Chris.

characters.name: Dr. Julius Raymond
characters.description: Dr. Julius Raymondthe stern principal at Corleone Junior High. He makes racist assumptions about Chris and thinks that Chris is a crack baby. He normally is always grumpy because, according to the adult Chris, the school didn't pay him enough for his job. It is implied that he is gay when he is shown dancing with men in a bar dressed in leather.

characters.name: Drew Rock
characters.description: Drew RockSeason 1Seasons 2 & 3Season 4AnimatedBiographyImageSeason 1Seasons 2 & 3Season 4AnimatedFull NameAndrew RockGenderMaleAge11 (Season 1)11-12 (Season 2)12-13 (Season 3)13-14 (Season 4)14-15 (Everybody Still Hates Chris)Born1971HometownNew YorkHouseBed StuyPersonal InformationProfessionMiddle School Student (Seasons 1-2)High School StudentGrocery Store ClerkEducation/SchoolLamont-Sanford Middle School (Seasons 1-2)High SchoolGrade6th-8th Grade (Seasons 1-2)9th Grade (Current)Physical InformationHair ColourBlackEye ColourBrownHeight5'4 (Season 1) 5'7 (Season 4) 5'11 (Current)RelativesParentsJulius Rock(father)Rochelle Rock(mother)SiblingsChris Rock(older brother)Tonya Rock(younger sister)FriendsJames(close friend)KeishaTasha(Friend)Mr. OmarGreg Wuliger(Friend)MannyRiskyProduction InformationEpisode appearancesAll EpisodesPortrayed byTequan RichmondTerrence Little Gardenhigh Mr. OmarGreg Wuliger(Friend)MannyRisky Andrew "Drew" Rockis one of the main characters inEverybody Hates Chris. He isChris' younger andTonya's second older brother. He is extremely charismatic and talented, which causes Chris no shortage of insecurity. Despite this, Drew has no ill-will towards Chris and in fact looks up to him. Drew is, for all intents and purposes, a typical young boy, caring more about toys, candy, and TV than school and even girls. Drew is endlessly charming and gifted, being a friendly guy despite his talents and being able to excel at anything he puts his mind to even without formal training. In particular, he shows a fondness for Asian cultures, teaching himself martial arts and Chinese, even eating dinner with chopsticks. He also either has a particular attraction to Asian women, or his love for Asian culture ends up wooing them. He is also a dedicated hockey fan, to the confusion of some Bed-Stuy residents, as hockey isn't a game that has much stake in the African-American community. In particular, he is a huge fan ofWayne Gretzky, asking his father for his jersey as a reward for passing his spelling test, and even skipping school to go all the way out to Long Island just to meet him. Drew has nary a malicious bone in his body and it takes a lot to truly get him mad. When Tonya broke his model car by trying to stuff her doll into it, he offered her the chance to apologize, but she refused, to which he ominously replied, "it's alright". Chris Rock notes that basically translates to, "you done messed up". He spends the next few days messing with her head until she finally apologizes, and even then, he makes her apologize numerous times to make up for her continued defiance. Another example is when Mr. Omar borrowed money from him, and dragged his feet about paying him back. Drew would continuously pester Mr. Omar about his debt, to the point where he surprised him in a limousine on the way to a funeral, threatening the latter by asking if he wanted to "make it two". When Chris catches him skipping school in order to meet Wayne Gretzky, he is very s

He also either has a particular attraction to Asian women, or his love for Asian culture ends up wooing them. He is also a dedicated hockey fan, to the confusion of some Bed-Stuy residents, as hockey isn't a game that has much stake in the African-American community. In particular, he is a huge fan ofWayne Gretzky, asking his father for his jersey as a reward for passing his spelling test, and even skipping school to go all the way out to Long Island just to meet him. Drew has nary a malicious bone in his body and it takes a lot to truly get him mad. When Tonya broke his model car by trying to stuff her doll into it, he offered her the chance to apologize, but she refused, to which he ominously replied, "it's alright". Chris Rock notes that basically translates to, "you done messed up". He spends the next few days messing with her head until she finally apologizes, and even then, he makes her apologize numerous times to make up for her continued defiance. Another example is when Mr. Omar borrowed money from him, and dragged his feet about paying him back. Dr

characters.name: Gene
characters.description: GeneBiographyFull NameEugene TingmanGenderMaleAge65 (Deceased)BornJune 30, 1918RelativesSpouseMaxine(wife)ParentsUnnamed MotherUnnmaed FatherSiblingsUnnamed BrothersUnnamed SistersChildrenRochelle Rock(daughter)Charlotte(daughter)Uncle Mike(son)Julius Rock(son-in-law)RelationshipsMousey(sister-in-law)Chris Rock(older grandson)Drew Rock(younger grandson)Tonya Rock(granddaughter)Production InformationAppeared inEverybody Hates FuneralsEpisode appearancesEverybody Hates GamblingEverybody Hates Promises(mentioned only)Everybody Hates Dirty Jokes(mentioned only)Everybody Hates the Port Authority(Last appearance)Portrayed byJimmie Walker Unnmaed Father Genewas the husband ofMaxine, the father ofRochelle, the brother-in-law ofMousey, the father-in-law ofJulius Rockand also the maternal grandfather ofChris,Drew, andTonya. Gene was known to be really funny, always making jokes that made people laugh. Unfortunately, while telling jokes at the dinner table inEverybody Hates Funerals, he had a heart attack and died. Nobody knew that he was having a heart attack because Gene was always joking, so they thought it was a joke. But once they found out Gene was actually having a heart attack, it was too late. Despite dying in his first episode appearance, he has made two other appearances inEverybody Hates GamblingandEverybody Hates the Port Authority. He was portrayed byJimmie Walker. From his first appearance, he is described to always put Rochelle in a good mood and always make her happy. He is very funny and full of excitement and jokes. The only other information known about his life was his love and hobby for gambling, which is what Rochelle greatly despised and kept on as an adult. Most of his relationships are understood based on how his family were impacted by his death. His wife,Maxinedespite not expressing any deep emotions was hurting from his passing asJuliusdescribed. Maxine mentions how she has been married to Gene for about 40 years. He was mentioned inEverybody Hates Dirty Jokesas Maxine kept coming unannounced and uninvited to the Rock's residences to help Rochelle with work around the house, much to Rochelle's displeasure. Julius suspects that this might be because she is lonely and her way of expressing how she greatly misses Gene. His relationship with his two other children, Mike and Charlotte were never expanded upon. However, after Maxine kicked Mike out for eating her cake, he comments inEverybody Hates Promisesthat he thinks Maxine is just tripping since Gene died and she is lashing out unfairly, despite her calling out Mike being a lazy bum who needs to get a job.

characters.name: Greg Wuliger
characters.description: Greg WuligerLive-actionAnimatedBiographyImageLive-actionAnimatedFull NameGregory WuligerGenderMaleAge13 (Season 1)14 (Season 2)15 (Season 3)16 (Season 4)17 (Current)BornNovember 24th 1969HometownNew York City U.SPersonal InformationProfessionStudentEducation/SchoolCorleone Junior High School(Season 1-3)Bronx Academy of Science (Season 4)Tattagalia High School(Season 4)Grade7th grade (Season 1)8th grade (Season 2)9th grade (Season 3)10th grade (Season 4)11th grade (Current)Physical InformationSpeciesHumanHair ColourBrownEye ColourBrownSkin ColourWhiteRaceAmerican, Italian, WhiteRelativesParentsArthur Wuliger(father)SiblingsNoneFriendsChris Rock(Best friend)Nerdy kids (best friends, formerly)Tasha ClarksonEnemiesJoey CarusoAlbertCoach ThurmanRelationshipsJenifier omaily(formerly)Production InformationAppeared inEverybody Hates the PilotEpisode appearances86 out of 88Portrayed byVincent MartellaGunnar SizemoreGregory "Greg" Wuliger, portrayed by Vincent Martella and voiced byGunnar Sizemore, is one of the main characters inEverybody Hates Chris. Greg is a Chris's only friend who goes to school with him atCorleone Junior High Schooland later,Tattagalia High School. 14 (Season 2)15 (Season 3)16 (Season 4)17 (Current) Bronx Academy of Science (Season 4)Tattagalia High School(Season 4) Greg isChris' weird, optimistic, nerdy, and anxious best friend. He is the only kid at Corleone Junior High who doesn't hate Chris. He is about as unpopular as Chris. Chris always comes to Greg for advice, even though Greg is usually terrible at coming up with solutions. On top of being a good student, Greg also has a series of odd quirks (such as going to bed dressed as different superheroes) but considers himself cool. He has a book about almost everything in his locker. He is an only child and is of Italian and Swedish descent. His mom married his dad because she lost a bet but ran off with his uncle. After graduating from Corleone, Greg was accepted into the Bronx Academy, a prestigious prep school in The Bronx, NY. In Season 4, he attends the Bronx Academy and earns an image of being the toughest kid in school. However, in the episodeEverybody Hates Cake, he gets kicked out as his tough image scares the students and it got him in trouble. He transfers toTattagalia High Schoolwhere Chris attends and the two continue their friendship and afterCarusopunches him, Greg gets back up and returns to his nerdy self again. At his first day in Tattagalia in the episodeEverybody Hates Homecoming, Greg has been feeling depressed for getting kicked out of the Bronx Academy. Chris convinces him to become the school football team mascot, where he gets kidnapped and forced to eat worms by the rival team, on top of that the team loses and everybody hates him causing Caruso to punch him. Greg falls deeper into depression and disappeared,Rochelleshows up at school before Chris arrives at his homecoming dance to help find him. Chris, although conflicted in standing up a cute homecoming d

characters.name: Jerome
characters.description: —Jerome, toChris JeromeLive-actionAnimatedBiographyImageLive-actionAnimatedGenderMaleHometownBedford-Stuyvesant, New YorkHouseApartmentPersonal InformationProfessionPetty ThiefHustlerPhysical InformationRaceBlackRelativesFriendsFat MikeChris RockJamesRiskyKill MovesProduction InformationAppeared inEverybody Hates Fat MikePortrayed byKevontay Jackson Chris Rock Jerome is about as affable as you'd expect a petty thief and hustler to be. He regularly robs Chris but is genuinely friendly and as helpful to him as he can be. His interactions with others also show a laid-back, friendly side, and his crimes are never violent, simply being petty robberies.

characters.name: Joey Caruso
characters.description: Joey CarusoLive-actionAnimatedBiographyImageLive-actionAnimatedFull NameJoseph CarusoGenderMaleAge13-17BornApril 22, 1968Personal InformationProfessionStudentBullyGrade7th-10thC- (7)F (4)Physical InformationHair ColourRedEye ColourGreenHeight5'10Weight230 lbsRaceItalian-AmericanRelativesFriendsChris RockHis school gang (best friends)EnemiesChris Rock(formerly)Greg WuligerProduction InformationAppeared inEverybody Hates the PilotEpisode appearances40 out of 88Portrayed byTravis T. FloryMikey Kelley(animated) Bully His school gang (best friends) Caruso is an unapologetic school bully. He picks on just about anyone he feels like, but he is extremely racist and when he first meets Chris and especially after being embarrassed by his principal in front of a crowd, he doesn't hesitate to call Chris the n-word, and from then on, derogatorily calls Chris by various names of black people, real or fictional. He's also shown to have it out for Asians, beating up a Chinese student and calling him "Mr. Miyagi", and later bullyingBernard Yaountil the latter starts to defend himself. If Chris isn't present, he'll settle for bullying Greg or anyone else in his reach. Underneath his brazen demeanor, Caruso has a softer side. He has an affection for cats, taking the time out of his day to visit cats up for adoption in pet stores. He also has somewhat of a sense of respect, genuinely wishing Chris luck when he makes the basketball team and even finally calling him by his name. When Chris' grandfather passes away, he sincerely offers his condolences and gives him a break for the day, later beating up a Chinese kid as a twisted way to honor him. When Chris wears his father's "lucky socks", when Caruso and his friends are beating up a Chinese boy, he offers Chris a chance to get some punches in. Finally, in the series finale, he admits that part of the reason he bullied Chris so relentlessly is that he always felt a sense of inferiority to Chris' intellect and persistence, overcoming adversity and, of course, Caruso's racist bullying.

characters.name: Julius Rock
characters.description: Julius RockLive-actionAnimatedBiographyImageLive-actionAnimatedFull NameChristopher Julius Rock IIGenderMaleAgePresumably 40sHometownNew York, U.S.A.HouseBed-Stuy, Brooklyn, New York, U.S.A.Personal InformationProfessionNewspaper DeliverymanSecurity GuardTaxi ServiceNumerous odd jobsPhysical InformationHair ColourBlack (bald)Eye ColourBrownHeight6'3"Skin ColourDark BrownRaceAfrican-AmericanRelativesSpouseRochelle Rock(wife)ParentsChristopher Julius Rock I (father)SiblingsRyan Rock (younger brother)Pete Rock (younger brother)Louis Rock (youngest brother)ChildrenChris Rock(older son)Drew Rock(younger son)Tonya Rock(daughter)Production InformationAppeared inEverybody Hates ChrisEpisode appearances88 out of 88Portrayed byTerry Crews Christopher Julius Rock II, portrayed byTerry Crews, is one of the main characters inEverybody Hates Chris. Julius was inspired byChris Rock's real-life father, Julius Rock, who passed away in 1988. Christopher Julius Rock II was born and raised during the Civil Rights Movement. He was raised alongside six brothers, two of them being Louis and Ryan Rock. Louis was always more talented and ended up becoming much more successful than Julius, making him very insecure and causes him to try looking good for or otherwise outdoing him whenever he visits. Around Christmas time, Julius' father would call the police and claim the house got robbed to get an insurance payout to afford gifts. Julius' personality is in direct contrast to his hulking appearance (and the typical Terry Crews character). A good way to describe him is as a gentle giant; he is easy to get along with, calm, and fairly quiet. He usually just wants to be left to his own devices, mostly due to how hard he works, stressing over keeping his family afloat, and juggling his hysterical wife and rambunctious children. Despite the dysfunction, he loves his family and he works as hard as he does to keep them cared for. On top of his worrywart traits, Julius is also somewhat insecure on an emotional level, thanks to his younger brother Louis being much more successful, charismatic, and talented than him. Whenever Louis stops by, Julius takes efforts to show him up, or impress him by buying things he wouldn't otherwise buy. Julius shows an amazing economic mind and is excellent with numbers and costs. He can determine something's expense down to the cents simply by looking at it. This is partially due to his cheapness, being someone who works two jobs for not a lot of money and just barely makes ends meet. This trait occasionally puts him at odds with his family, especially Rochelle, who has a snobby, expensive taste and is often not working herself, while the kids often want some sort of new entertainment or other superficial thing typical of children. Julius has a love for unhealthy food, namely red meats, fried chicken in particular, and hates most healthier food. He will usually eat typical mealtime vegetables like potatoes, carrots, and beans with his dinners but can

He was raised alongside six brothers, two of them being Louis and Ryan Rock. Louis was always more talented and ended up becoming much more successful than Julius, making him very insecure and causes him to try looking good for or otherwise outdoing him whenever he visits. Around Christmas time, Julius' father would call the police and claim the house got robbed to get an insurance payout to afford gifts. Julius' personality is in direct contrast to his hulking appearance (and the typical Terry Crews character). A good way to describe him is as a gentle giant; he is easy to get along with, calm, and fairly quiet. He usually just wants to be left to his own devices, mostly due to how hard he works, stressing over keeping his family afloat, and juggling his hysterical wife and rambunctious children. Despite the dysfunction, he loves his family and he works as hard as he does to keep them cared for. On top of his worrywart traits, Julius is also somewhat insecure on an emotional level, thanks to his younger brother Louis being much more successful, charismatic, and talented than him. Whenever Louis stops by, Julius takes efforts to show him up, or impress him by buying things he wouldn't otherwise buy. Julius shows an amazing economic mind and is excellent with numbers and costs. He can determine something's expense down to the cents simply by looking at it. This is partially due to his cheapness, being someone who works two jobs for not a lot of money and just barely makes ends meet. This trait occasionally puts him at odds with his family, especially Rochelle, who has a snobby, expensive taste and is often not working herself, while the kids often want some sort of new entertainment or other superficial thing typical of children. Julius has a love for unhealthy food, namely red meats, fried chicken in particular, and hates most healthier food. He will usually eat typical mealtime vegetables like potatoes, carrots, and beans with his dinners but can

characters.name: Keisha Ridenhour
characters.description: Keisha RidenhourBiographyImageKeisha.jpgGenderFemaleAge12 (Season 1)BornMarch 16th, 1970HometownBed-Stuy (formerly)ComptonPhysical InformationSpeciesHumanSkin ColourBrownRelativesParentsSheila Ridenhour(mother)FriendsLisaDrew(crush)TonyaRelationshipsDrew(crush)Production InformationAppeared inEverybody Hates the PilotPortrayed byAree Davis Compton Drew(crush)Tonya Like plenty of people around Chris and despite being friends with him, she is actually very mean to him. Anytime Chris attempted to express any interest in her, she harshly and coldly shoots him down, always breaking his heart and hurting him. However, she is very well-liked by others around her, including Chris's family. She, like most every girl, shows more interest and favorability towards Drew over Chris. ￼

characters.name: Kris
characters.description: KrisFirst AppearanceEverybody Hates KrisActorRichard LewisLast AppearanceEverybody Hates Kris Kris, a mysterious man whom Chris befriends at the hospital while hes sick. At the end of the episode hes disappears . Chris is told by the nurse there was never anyone in that bed and hes delirious . It is possible Kris is either a Christmas angel or an illusion because Chris was delirious at the time.  He only appears in one episode "Everybody Hates Kris"
